private_key.description: peer's private key (lets the router generate this peer's client config)

responder.description: only respond to handshakes, never initiate

client_address.description: client tunnel address(es) for the generated client config

client_dns.description: DNS server(s) written into the generated client config

client_endpoint.description: server endpoint host[:port] written into the generated client config

client_keepalive.description: client persistent-keepalive for the generated config e.g. "25s"

client_listen_port.description: listen-port written into the generated client config
